pkgmetadata.longdescription: PyMacaroonsPyMacaroons is a Python implementation of Macaroons. Theyre better than cookiesInstallation------------Install PyMacaroons by running pip install pymacaroonsContribute----------- Issue Tracker_- Source Code_.. _Issue Tracker httpsgithub.comecordellpymacaroonsissues.. _Source Code httpsgithub.comecordellpymacaroonsLicense-------The project is licensed under the MIT license.
